name: xiaoduiyou-runtime-skills
description: Xiaoduiyou runtime skills for Codex IM, content-package, and Growth Diary workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Xiaoduiyou IM, document, and Growth Diary workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installs the Xiaoduiyou runtime skills that define IM message handling, visual card delivery, document and content-package creation, and Growth Diary read/write behavior for Codex.
defaultPrompt: Write a Xiaoduiyou Growth Diary record.
